name: BANKSY Spatial Domain Detection Service
description: Detect spatial domains using BANKSY (BANKSY: Spatial Clustering with Neighbor-Aware Gene Expression), which combines spatial neighborhood information with gene expression for improved domain identification. Produces UMAP and spatial distribution plots.

n_neighbors.description: Number of spatial neighbors for computing neighborhood-weighted expression

lambda_adj.description: Neighbor weight parameter (0-1). Higher values give more weight to neighbor expression

resolution.description: Clustering resolution (leiden/louvain). Higher values yield more domains

n_pcs.description: Number of principal components for dimensionality reduction

file.description: Preprocessed spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) with expression matrix and spatial coordinates

output_config.collection_description: Outputs spatial domain detection results and visualization plots.

items.description: AnnData object (h5ad format) containing spatial domain detection results. Attributes: 'X' (expression matrix), 'obs' (metadata with 'banksy' domain labels), 'var' (gene metadata), 'obsm' (spatial coordinates, UMAP coordinates if computed, BANKSY PCA embeddings), 'layers' (banksy_neighbor: neighborhood-weighted expression), 'uns' (neighbor graph and clustering information)
UMAP domain plot (PNG, 300 DPI) colored by detected spatial domains; generated when UMAP coordinates are computed
Spatial domain plot (PNG, 300 DPI) showing detected domains on spatial coordinates; generated when spatial coordinates are available
Text report containing service statistics and summary information
